headline: Crowdstrike To Rally Around 10%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Top analysts change outlooks on top names: UBS raises price target for TD Synnex, BMO Capital raises target for Goldman Sachs, Citigroup raises target for Pinterest, and more.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Eastman Chemical, Raises Price Target to $83
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Vincent Andrews   maintains Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $73 to $83.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Sector Perform on Eastman Chemical, Raises Price Target to $82
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $79 to $82.
